fkcompute.interactive — Interactive Wizard¶

The interactive subpackage provides a Rich-based terminal user interface for guided FK computation.

Note

This subpackage requires the rich library. Install it with pip install "fkcompute[interactive]".

Invoking the Wizard¶

The wizard is launched by running fk (with no sub-command) or fk interactive:

fk                       # full interactive session
fk interactive --quick   # skip optional prompts

From Python (not normally needed):

from fkcompute.interactive.wizard import FKWizard

wizard = FKWizard()
wizard.run()

Module Reference¶

fkcompute.interactive.wizard¶

Enhanced wizard for guided FK computations with progress tracking.

class fkcompute.interactive.wizard.FKWizard[source]¶

Bases: object

Enhanced wizard for guided FK computations with progress tracking.

run_wizard() → bool[source]¶

Run main wizard interface.

class fkcompute.interactive.wizard.QuickWizard[source]¶

Bases: object

Simplified wizard for rapid computations.

static quick_computation()[source]¶

Run a quick computation with minimal prompts.

fkcompute.interactive.wizard.run_enhanced_interactive() → None[source]¶

Run the enhanced interactive wizard.

fkcompute.interactive.wizard.run_quick_interactive() → None[source]¶

Run the quick interactive mode.

fkcompute.interactive.progress¶

Progress tracking for FK computations.

FKProgressTracker is passed to the internal _fk_compute function as the _progress_callback argument. It receives phase events and renders Rich progress panels:

  • start_inversion / complete_inversion

  • start_ilp_generation / complete_ilp_generation

  • start_fk_computation / update_fk_progress / complete_fk_computation

class fkcompute.interactive.progress.FKProgressTracker[source]¶

Bases: object

Tracks and displays progress during FK computation phases.

start_inversion(braid: list, degree: int) → Any | None[source]¶

Start inversion calculation phase.

update_inversion_progress(current: int, total: int, description: str = '')[source]¶

Update inversion progress.

complete_inversion(components: int)[source]¶

Mark inversion as complete.

start_ilp_generation() → Any | None[source]¶

Start ILP generation phase.

complete_ilp_generation(constraints: int)[source]¶

Mark ILP generation as complete.

start_fk_computation(threads: int, total_points: int) → Any | None[source]¶

Start FK computation phase.

update_fk_progress(current: int, total: int, point_info: Dict | None = None)[source]¶

Update FK computation progress.

complete_fk_computation(terms_count: int)[source]¶

Mark FK computation as complete.

start_symbolic_generation() → Any | None[source]¶

Start symbolic output generation.

complete_symbolic_generation()[source]¶

Mark symbolic generation as complete.

start_file_operations(operation: str) → Any | None[source]¶

Start file operations (saving/loading).

complete_file_operations()[source]¶

Mark file operations as complete.

show_phase_summary()[source]¶

Display a summary of current computation phase.

class fkcompute.interactive.progress.StatusMessage[source]¶

Bases: object

Display status messages during computation.

static info(message: str)[source]¶
static success(message: str)[source]¶
static warning(message: str)[source]¶
static error(message: str)[source]¶
class fkcompute.interactive.progress.ResourceMonitor[source]¶

Bases: object

Monitor and display system resources during computation.

start_monitoring()[source]¶

Start resource monitoring.

stop_monitoring()[source]¶

Stop resource monitoring.

get_status() → Dict[str, Any][source]¶

Get current resource status.

display_status()[source]¶

Display current resource status.

fkcompute.interactive.ui¶

Rich UI components for enhanced interactive experience.

class fkcompute.interactive.ui.BorderedSection(title: str, color: str = 'blue', border_style: str = 'blue')[source]¶

Bases: object

Creates a bordered section with consistent styling.

class fkcompute.interactive.ui.StatusMessage[source]¶

Bases: object

Displays colored status messages with appropriate icons.

static success(message: str)[source]¶

Display success message with green checkmark.

static error(message: str)[source]¶

Display error message with red X.

static warning(message: str)[source]¶

Display warning message with yellow warning sign.

static info(message: str)[source]¶

Display info message with blue info icon.

static step(step_num: int, total: int, message: str)[source]¶

Display step indicator.

class fkcompute.interactive.ui.ValidatedInput[source]¶

Bases: object

Enhanced input handling with real-time validation.

static get_braid(prompt: str = 'Enter braid word') → List[int][source]¶

Get and validate braid input with examples and real-time feedback.

static get_degree(prompt: str = 'Enter computation degree', braid: List[int] | None = None) → int[source]¶

Get and validate degree with smart suggestions.

static get_preset() → str | None[source]¶

Let user select from available presets.

static get_custom_parameters() → Dict[str, Any][source]¶

Get custom computation parameters interactively.

static get_threads(preset: str | None = None) → int[source]¶

Get thread count with preset-based suggestions.

static get_name() → str | None[source]¶

Get optional computation name.

static get_symbolic() → Dict[str, Any][source]¶

Get symbolic output preference and format type.

Returns a dict with keys "symbolic" (bool) and "format_type" (str, one of pretty/inline/latex/mathematica).

static get_save_preference() → bool[source]¶

Get save data preference.

class fkcompute.interactive.ui.ComputationSummary[source]¶

Bases: object

Display a summary of computation parameters before execution.

static show(params: Dict[str, Any]) → bool[source]¶

Show parameter summary and ask for confirmation.

fkcompute.interactive.prompts¶

High-level prompts and menu functions for interactive mode.

fkcompute.interactive.prompts.show_main_menu() → str[source]¶

Display main interactive menu.

fkcompute.interactive.prompts.get_computation_parameters() → Dict[str, Any] | None[source]¶

Collect all computation parameters interactively.

fkcompute.interactive.prompts.show_help_menu()[source]¶

Display help and examples.

fkcompute.interactive.history¶

Computation history and session management.

class fkcompute.interactive.history.ComputationHistory(history_file: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Manages computation history and sessions.

save_computation(params: Dict[str, Any], result: Dict[str, Any], computation_time: float = 0.0) → str[source]¶

Save a computation to history.

get_recent_computations(limit: int = 10) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]¶

Get recent computations.

search_computations(query: str) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]¶

Search computations by braid, name, or other criteria.

load_configuration(computation_id: str) → Dict[str, Any] | None[source]¶

Load parameters from a previous computation.

delete_computation(computation_id: str) → bool[source]¶

Delete a computation from history.

clear_history() → bool[source]¶

Clear all computation history.

export_history(filepath: str) → bool[source]¶

Export history to a file.

import_history(filepath: str) → bool[source]¶

Import history from a file.

display_recent(limit: int = 10)[source]¶

Display recent computations in a nice table.

display_search_results(query: str)[source]¶

Display search results.

interactive_select() → Dict[str, Any] | None[source]¶

Let user interactively select a previous computation.

class fkcompute.interactive.history.SessionManager(config_file: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Manages user session and preferences.

save_preference(key: str, value: Any)[source]¶

Save a user preference.

get_preference(key: str, default: Any = None) → Any[source]¶

Get a user preference.
